title: OcexAcknowledgment
description: An OCEX functional acknowledgment document, equivalent to EDI 997. Confirms receipt of a previously transmitted OCEX document and reports any validation errors.

id.description: Unique identifier for this acknowledgment document.

type.description: Discriminator field identifying this as an acknowledgment document.

sender.description: The party sending this acknowledgment (the receiver of the original document).

receiver.description: The party receiving this acknowledgment (the sender of the original document).

documentDate.description: ISO 8601 date on which this acknowledgment was created (YYYY-MM-DD).

referencedDocumentId.description: The `id` of the OCEX document being acknowledged.

accepted.description: True if the referenced document was accepted without fatal errors; false if it was rejected.

errors.description: List of validation errors found in the referenced document. Empty array when accepted is true.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata for extension or passthrough data.

message.description: Human-readable description of the validation error.
